artPrompt: An evocative empty corner office radiating quiet menace: a heavy executive chair behind a vast tidy desk, a single small window opening onto a blank gray wall, faint cyan arcane glow seeping from neat stacks of unmarked forms. Rubber stamps and a coat rack stand sentinel. The room climbs the wide frame, window high, desk anchoring the base. Wide 4:3 landscape, oppressive bureaucratic stillness, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: The Corner Office
text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, convene a meeting: each opponent may pay {1}. For each opponent who doesn't, you draw a card and they are "noted as absent."
Creatures you control with a desk (a Bureaucrat, Clerk, Auditor, Notary, or Inspector) get +0/+2.
flavorText: It has a window. The window faces a wall. The wall is also hers.
